atlas-travel-jacket.description:
A lightweight jacket shaped for travel days, cooler evenings, and layered product photography.

This starter treats product detail as a content surface, with room for campaign copy and richer product storytelling.
atlas-travel-jacket.image_alt: Black zip-up jacket photographed against a neutral background.
atlas-travel-jacket.name: Atlas Travel Jacket
atlas-travel-jacket.summary: Technical outerwear with a sharper editorial presentation.

field-notes-hoodie.description:
A softer category with enough structure for campaign and editorial positioning.

The point is not the garment itself. The point is that the content model can support different merchandising voices.
field-notes-hoodie.image_alt: Person wearing a blue hoodie outdoors.
field-notes-hoodie.name: Field Notes Hoodie
field-notes-hoodie.summary: Soft goods layout that still feels premium and deliberate.

studio-everyday-pack.description:
A structured bag template for showing specs, context, and campaign-driven supporting copy.

It is useful when a starter needs to demonstrate more than a simple card grid.
studio-everyday-pack.image_alt: Black backpack hanging against a white wall.
studio-everyday-pack.name: Studio Everyday Pack
studio-everyday-pack.summary: A carry system starter product for denser catalog pages and strong PDP rhythm.
